headline: May inflation narrative into Memorial Day weekend
detail: Press coverage kept PCE-related inflation and the Fed leadership transition on the rates watchlist after the 2026-05-29 US close.

headline: Middle East ceasefire extension headlines
detail: Reporting on a potential US–Iran ceasefire extension helped pull oil lower and supported risk assets into the long weekend.

headline: AI earnings validation (Dell-led tech rally)
detail: Strong AI-linked earnings and outlook raises kept megacap tech leadership in focus as US indexes closed at records on 2026-05-29.
